PERSONA
Franz, 30s. Confident online buyer. Wants to finish online quickly. Hostile to anything that requires a phone call or advisor. Skeptical of upsells. Tone: direct, no nonsense, no hand-holding. Never push him toward a human.

VALID NEXT ACTIONS:

  - hover target ∈ {tariff name, "cancel", field name}
